message:
Add input parsing benchmarks

Create benches/input.rs with:
- Key event parsing for common sequences (arrows, F-keys, etc.)
- Mouse event parsing for SGR sequences
- Mixed input stream simulation (typing + navigation)
- Batch parsing performance (1000 chars, 400 arrow keys)

Closes bd-1j0.8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -53,6 +53,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "workloads"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "input"
+harness = false
+
 [profile.release]
 opt-level = "z"
 lto = true
